Executioner Verdict Sword's Soul

Once in a while, the unit tears the armor of all enemy units. When an enemy's armor is torn, the affected unit takes 650000 pure damage and has their physical armor reduced by 30% for 4 sec. Stacks up to 1 times. Each of these enemy units also receives 500000 physical damage for 4 sec. Each of the affected units also has a 50% chance to be additionally stunned for 2 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
